overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a foggy rural village. The character travels along dirt paths past wooden fences and thatched-roof huts in a medieval fantasy setting with overcast lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path approaching village with distant castle

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt path toward village, swords visible on back

entered.detail: medieval stone fortress with towers visible through morning mist
rough wooden posts lining the left side of the path
wooden fence posts running along the right side of the trail
worn dirt trail with patches of gravel and mud
leafless deciduous trees indicating autumn season
tall brownish grass growing alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy rural path with a distant stone castle visible through the mist. Geralt walks steadily forward along the dirt trail, passing wooden fence posts on both sides while bare autumn trees line the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden plank bridge crossing wet ground at village entrance

events.description: approaching and crossing wooden plank bridge over muddy water
entering village area with first thatched-roof hut becoming visible

agents.ego_description: crossing wooden plank bridge and entering the village perimeter

entered.detail: rough wooden planks laid across muddy ground forming a makeshift crossing
traditional wooden hut with straw thatched roof entering view

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as Geralt approaches a wooden plank bridge crossing a muddy section. After crossing, the first thatched-roof hut of the village comes into view on the left while the distant castle fades into the fog behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: village path between thatched-roof huts with lit torches

events.description: passing lit torch sconce mounted on wooden hut wall

agents.ego_description: walking through village past wooden huts and fences, passing a lit torch

entered.detail: burning torch mounted on the wall of the thatched hut providing warm light

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through the heart of the small village, passing close to a thatched-roof hut with a burning torch sconce on its wall. The wooden fences continue along the path as the character moves deeper into the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside path leaving village with distant mountains

events.description: exiting village into open fields with distant mountains becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking along path away from village into open countryside

entered.detail: tall evergreen pine trees marking the edge of the village
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon beyond the fields

segments.scene_description: Leaving the village behind, the path opens into countryside with pine trees on the right and distant mountains visible through the haze. The wooden fences recede into the distance as Geralt continues along the trail into the open landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural trail that leads from a misty wilderness through a small village and back into the open countryside. It begins on a foggy dirt path with a distant stone castle looming through the mist, moving past wooden fence posts and bare autumn trees. As the path narrows, the camera follows Geralt across a wooden plank bridge over a muddy section, where the castle fades from view and the first thatched-roof huts of a settlement emerge. The scene then shifts into the heart of the village, passing close to a hut with a burning torch sconce before the wooden fences begin to recede. Finally, the trail opens back into the wide landscape, moving past pine trees toward distant mountains visible through the haze.
